title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for real-world events after years of regulatory battles and a lawsuit against the government agency overseeing derivatives trading. The company achieved a $22 billion valuation with millions of customers and billions in volume through conviction and persistence.
